name: Sebze Bastisi (Vegetable Stew - Turkish)
recipeIngredient: 2 Green peppers (seeds removed and cut into strips)
1 cup String beans, in 1 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: Green peppers should be seeded and cut into strips.
2. Cut eggplant into 1/4 inch slices, sprinkle with salt, and set aside for 30 minutes. Wash off the salt, drain, and pat dry with paper towels.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet. Add the eggplant slices and fry until browned on both sides. Transfer to a baking dish.
4. Fry the onions and peppers in the remaining butter for 3 minutes. Add the zucchini and beans and fry for an additional 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Place the vegetables on top of the eggplant.
6. Add garlic, parsley, sugar, pepper, salt, and beef broth to the baking dish.
7. Cover and place in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour.
8. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving hot.
